image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about monsoons than social media does.
Context visual: Monsoons occur when land heats up faster than oceans. This creates pressure differences.
Escalation visual: As warm air rises, it pulls in moisture-laden winds, leading to heavy rains.
Evidence visual: These rains are crucial for agriculture in many regions, but they can also cause devastating floods.
Payoff visual: So, next time you hear about monsoons, remember, there’s science behind the storms.
Cta visual: Curious about more weather wonders? Hit like and follow for more!
